# awscc_bedrockagentcore_browser_profile (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::BedrockAgentCore::BrowserProfile



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the browser profile was created.
- `description` (String) The description of the browser profile.
- `last_saved_at` (String) Timestamp when the browser profile was last saved.
- `last_saved_browser_id` (String) ID of the last saved browser.
- `last_saved_browser_session_id` (String) ID of the last saved browser session.
- `last_updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the browser profile was last updated.
- `name` (String) The name of the browser profile.
- `profile_arn` (String) The ARN of a BrowserProfile resource.
- `profile_id` (String) The id of the browser profile.
- `status` (String) Status of browser profile
- `tags` (Map of String) A map of tag keys and values.
